steps.title: Treat the group as one value
steps.content: The expression $4x+5$ appears as a single grouped quantity on both sides of the equation. Subtract $4(4x+5)$ from both sides to isolate the remaining groups.

steps.title: Find the grouped value
steps.content: Divide both sides by $2$ to get the requested expression itself: $$4x+5=41$$ The value of $4x+5$ is $41$. The answer is B.
